violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. Cutting boards underneath the deli meat slicer are gouged and are not easily cleanable.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Surface of equipment/utensil did not reach minimum temperature of 160F during hot water sanitize rinse of warewash machine. Dish machine in bakery not maintaining minimum rinse cycle temperatures. Reached a maximum of 149 degrees at the time of inspection.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Walk-in cooler/freezer floors throughout the facility need to be cleaned more thoroughly.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Box of frozen chicken on the floor in the walk-in freezer by the deli.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. Use of "sponge-like" liner being used in the cake decorating area to dry dishes is not smooth, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Surface of equipment/utensil did not reach minimum temperature of 160F during hot water sanitize rinse of ware-wash machine. Dish machine in bakery not maintaining minimum rinse cycle temperatures.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Exposed studs, joists or rafters were not covered with smooth, nonabsorbent and easily cleanable material. Ceiling above the bakery oven was exposed, ceiling tiles were absent.
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
